fields.name: Data Exch. Def Code
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table that holds the fields to or from which data is exchanged according to the mapping.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the data exchange mapping setup.

fields.name: Mapping Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that is used to map the specified columns or XML data elements to fields in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Data Exch. No. Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Data Exch. Line Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Data Exch. Line Def Code
fields.tooltip: There is no Help for the fields in this table. This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Pre-Mapping Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that prepares the mapping between fields in Dynamics 365 and external data.

fields.name: Post-Mapping Codeunit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the codeunit that completes the mapping between fields in Dynamics 365 and the external data file or service.

fields.name: Use as Intermediate Table
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the table that you select in the Table ID field is an intermediate table where the imported data is stored before it is mapped to the target table.

fields.name: Key Index
fields.tooltip: Specifies the key index to sort the source records before exporting.

fields.name: Key
fields.tooltip: Specifies the key to sort the source records before exporting.
